title: mairrania uva-ursi
intro: Mairrania uva-ursi, also known as bearberry or kinnikinnick, is a low-growing, deciduous shrub native to Northern Europe, Asia, and North America. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its astringent and antiseptic properties, which make it effective against urinary tract infections and other conditions. The health benefits of Mairrania uva-ursi include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and support the immune system. Mairrania uva-ursi is commonly prepared as a tea, capsule, or tincture, and can also be found in combination with other herbs in various herbal preparations, such as infusions and salves.
